nasb.text: But He kept silent and did not answer. Again the high priest was questioning Him, and saying to Him, “Are You the Christ, the Son of the Blessed One?”

esv.text: But he remained silent and made no answer. Again the high priest asked him, “Are you the Christ, the Son of the Blessed?”

cnv.text: 耶穌卻不作聲，甚麼也不回答。大祭司又問他：“你是那受稱頌者的兒子基督嗎？”

ccb.text: 耶稣还是沉默不语，什么也不答。大祭司又问祂：“你是那当受称颂者的儿子基督吗？”

csbs.text: 耶稣沉默不语，什么也不回答。大祭司又问他，说：“你是基督——那当受颂赞者的儿子吗？”
